# Add commands for Java 17 (mandatory)

## Code Style

Java 17 (mandatory): Follow standard conventions

## API Versioning

- Public backend endpoints MUST use path versioning (`/api/v{major}/...`).
- Breaking API changes MUST bump the major path version.
